headline: Thermo Fisher Deepens Oncology Role With Ibtrozi Manufacturing Milestone
summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific (NYSE:TMO) has completed technology transfer and product introduction for Ibtrozi, a treatment for ROS1-positive non-small cell lung cancer. This marks a key milestone in its collaboration with Nuvation Bio and reflects a deeper role in biopharma manufacturing and oncology drug commercialization. For investors watching NYSE:TMO, this update highlights the company’s position as a partner for complex drug production in cancer care, not just a supplier of equipment and...

headline: Thermo Fisher Scientific’s PPD Clinical Research Business Expands Bioanalytical Capabilities with New Laboratory in Gothenburg, Sweden
summary: WALTHAM, Mass., May 18, 2026--Thermo Fisher Scientific, the world leader in serving science, today announced the opening of a new bioanalytical and biomarker laboratory in Gothenburg, Sweden, located within GoCo Health Innovation City. This new facility expands the company’s global bioanalytical capabilities to support pharmaceutical and biotechnology customers across all phases of drug development.

headline: Life Science Instrumentation Market Forecast Report 2025-2031: Expanding Activities in Genomics, Proteomics, and Drug Discovery with Thermo Fisher Scientific, Danaher, Agilent, and Shimadzu Leading
summary: The global life science instrumentation market is forecasted to grow from USD 63.4 billion in 2025 to USD 92.5 billion by 2031, at a CAGR of 6.5%. Key drivers include increased R&D funding, rising proteomics research, and growing disease prevalence. In 2025, the spectroscopy segment dominated the market owing to its integration in pharmaceutical and biotechnology research. headline: Nuvation Bio Sharpens IBTROZI Focus With Thermo Fisher And FDA Steps
summary: Nuvation Bio (NYSE:NUVB) has completed a technology transfer partnership with Thermo Fisher Scientific for manufacturing IBTROZI. The company announced that the FDA has accepted a supplemental New Drug Application for IBTROZI, supported by new long term data. Updated IBTROZI clinical results in advanced ROS1 positive NSCLC were recently presented at the AACR Annual Meeting. Nuvation Bio comes into these IBTROZI updates with a share price of $4.32 and a mixed return profile. The stock is...
